title: Carol Of The Christmas Morn
content:
Carol of the Christmas morn--
    Carol of the Christ-child born--
    Carol to the list'ning sky
    Till it echoes back again
    "Glory be to God on high,
    Peace on earth, good will tow'rd men!"
meaning:
This evocative piece by Eugene Field, titled "Carol Of The Christmas Morn", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
